map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: If not supposed to eat battery, why battery taste good?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Fight me or fight me, the choice is yours!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh, hi there, fighty fighty time?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Every time you run away from a battle I get a little closer.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hey, so I might be a little lost.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You ever meet Mr. Nice? He sure is a very real person that I didn't just make up now!
